proof:
have hx : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have hδ1 : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ1
  have hy1le : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hy1
  have : |y| ≤ 1 + |x| := le_trans hx (add_le_add_right hy1le _)
  simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this
failed_attempts:
have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hy1le : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hy1
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add y (-x) : |y + -x| ≤ |y| + |-x|)
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
          (abs_add x (y - x) : |x + (y - x)| ≤ |x| + |y - x|)
      _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by gcongr
  simpa [add_comm] using this

have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ
  have hy1' : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hy1
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add y (-x))
  calc
    |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
        (abs_add y (-x))
    _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr

have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hxy : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ
  have hx : |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add x (y - x))
  have hx' : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := hx
      _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by gcongr; exact le_of_lt hxy
  exact hx'

have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hyδ : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ
  have hyδ' : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hyδ
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
    have : y = x + (y - x) := by ring
    calc
      |y| = |x + (y - x)| := by simpa [this]
      _ ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by simpa using abs_add x (y - x)
  calc
    |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := this
    _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by nlinarith

have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hy2 : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  calc
    |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := hy2
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by gcongr; exact le_of_lt hy1
    _ = |x| + 1 := by ring

have hx : |x| ≤ |y| + |y - x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x).trans_eq (by ring)
  have hyx : |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_add x (y - x)).trans_eq (by ring)
  have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hlt : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ
  have hle : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hlt
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := le_trans hyx (by gcongr)
  simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this

have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ
  have hy1' : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hy1
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add y (-x))
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using (abs_add y (-x))
      _ = |x| + |y - x| := by ring
      _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by
        gcongr
  simpa [add_comm] using this

have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ
  have hy1' : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hy1
  have : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_add y (-x) ▸ (abs_sub_le_iff.1 (le_rfl) y x).1)
  calc
    |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
        (le_trans (le_of_eq (by ring_nf)) (abs_add (y - x) x))
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right hy1' _
    _ = |x| + 1 := by ring

have hx : |x| ≤ |y| + |y - x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x).trans_eq (by ring_nf)
  have hx' : |x| ≤ |y| + δ := le_trans hx (add_le_add_left (le_of_lt hy) _)
  have hx'' : |x| ≤ |y| + 1 := le_trans hx' (add_le_add_left δle1 _)
  have : |x| - 1 ≤ |y| := by linarith
  have : |y| ≥ |x| - 1 := this
  have : |y| + 1 ≥ |x| := by linarith
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := by
    have : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
        (abs_add (y - x) x)
    have : |y| ≤ δ + |x| := le_trans this (add_le_add_right (le_of_lt hy) _)
    have : |y| ≤ 1 + |x| := le_trans this (add_le_add_right δle1 _)
    simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this
  exact this

have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hy2 : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  calc
    |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := hy2
    _ < 1 + |x| := by gcongr
    _ = |x| + 1 := by ring
    _ = |x| + 1 := rfl

have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hy2 : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  calc
    |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := hy2
    _ < 1 + |x| := add_lt_add_right hy1 _
    _ = |x| + 1 := by ring

have : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have hylt : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hyle : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hylt
  linarith

have hylt : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hylt' : |y| - |x| < 1 := by
    calc
      |y| - |x| ≤ |y - x| := by
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using (sub_le_iff_le_add).2 (le_trans (by
          simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc] using (abs_sub_le_iff.1 (le_of_eq (by ring))).2) (le_rfl))
      _ < 1 := hylt
  have : |y| < |x| + 1 := by
    linarith
  exact le_of_lt this

have h1 : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have h2 : |y| ≤ δ + |x| := by
    calc
      |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := h1
      _ ≤ δ + |x| := by gcongr; exact le_of_lt hy
  have h3 : |y| ≤ 1 + |x| := by
    calc
      |y| ≤ δ + |x| := h2
      _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by gcongr
         exact δle1
  simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using h3

have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hxy : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ
  have : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  calc
    |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := this
    _ < 1 + |x| := add_lt_add_right hxy _
    _ = |x| + 1 := by ring

have hylt : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hle : |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add x (y - x))
  calc
    |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := hle
    _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by
      gcongr
      exact le_of_lt hylt

have hyδ : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hyδle : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hyδ
  have h1 : |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add y (-x)).trans_eq (by simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc])
  have h2 : |x| + |y - x| ≤ |x| + 1 := by
    exact add_le_add_left hyδle _
  exact le_trans h1 h2

calc
    |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (y - x) x
    _ ≤ δ + |x| := by gcongr; exact le_of_lt hy
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by gcongr
    _ = |x| + 1 := by ring
successful_attempts:
have hx : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have hδ1 : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ1
  have hy1le : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hy1
  have : |y| ≤ 1 + |x| := le_trans hx (add_le_add_right hy1le _)
  simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this

have hylt : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hy1 : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hylt
  have htri : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := htri
      _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right hy1 _
      _ = |x| + 1 := by ring
  exact this

have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ
  have hy1' : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hy1
  calc
    |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (y - x) x
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by gcongr
    _ = |x| + 1 := by ring_nf

have hx : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have hx' : |y| < δ + |x| := lt_of_le_of_lt hx (add_lt_add_right hy _)
  have hx'' : |y| < 1 + |x| := lt_of_lt_of_le hx' (add_le_add_right δle1 _)
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := le_of_lt (by simpa [add_comm] using hx'')
  exact this

have hδ : δ ≤ 1 := δle1
  have hxy : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy hδ
  have : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have : |y| < |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := this
      _ < 1 + |x| := by gcongr
      _ = |x| + 1 := by ring
  exact le_of_lt this

have hyδ : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hyδle : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hyδ
  calc
    |y| = |x + (y - x)| := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by simpa [add_comm] using abs_add x (y - x)
    _ ≤ |x| + 1 := by nlinarith

have hx : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have hx' : |y| ≤ δ + |x| := le_trans hx (add_le_add_right (le_of_lt hy) _)
  have hx'' : |y| ≤ 1 + |x| := le_trans hx' (add_le_add_right δle1 _)
  simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hx''

have hylt : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hyx : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hylt
  have : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  calc
    |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := this
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by gcongr
    _ = |x| + 1 := by ring

have hxy : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have : |y| ≤ δ + |x| := le_trans hxy (add_le_add_right (le_of_lt hy) _)
  have : |y| ≤ 1 + |x| := le_trans this (add_le_add_right δle1 _)
  simpa [add_comm] using this

have h1 : |y| = |(y - x) + x| := by ring_nf
  rw [h1]
  have h2 : |(y - x) + x| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using abs_add (y - x) x
  have h3 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have h4 : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt h3
  calc
    |(y - x) + x| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := h2
    _ ≤ 1 + |x| := add_le_add_right h4 _
    _ = |x| + 1 := by ring

have h1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + |y - x| := by
    have := abs_add x (y - x)
    simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, sub_eq_add_neg, add_sub_cancel] using this
  have : |y| < |x| + 1 := lt_of_le_of_lt this (add_lt_add_left h1 _)
  exact le_of_lt this

have hyδ : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hyδ' : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hyδ
  have : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have : |y| ≤ 1 + |x| := le_trans this (add_le_add_right hyδ' _)
  simpa [add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using this

have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hy2 : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have hy3 : |y| < |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := hy2
      _ < 1 + |x| := by gcongr
      _ = |x| + 1 := by ring
  exact le_of_lt hy3

have hy1 : |y - x| < 1 := lt_of_lt_of_le hy δle1
  have hy1le : |y - x| ≤ 1 := le_of_lt hy1
  have hy2 : |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
      (abs_add (y - x) x)
  have : |y| ≤ |x| + 1 := by
    calc
      |y| ≤ |y - x| + |x| := hy2
      _ ≤ 1 + |x| := by gcongr
      _ = |x| + 1 := by ring
  exact this
